counsellor_tactics.translation: So you can look at colleges through JEE as well as some colleges that have their own application forms.

counsellor_tactics.translation: Sir, I can tell you about both. I can tell you about private colleges as well as government colleges.

counsellor_tactics.description: The counsellor offered to share information via WhatsApp to facilitate communication with the student.
counsellor_tactics.quote: Sir main na aapko WhatsApp ka number drop kar rahi hu main apna.
counsellor_tactics.translation: Sir, I am dropping my WhatsApp number for you.

objections.handling_strategy: The counsellor reassured the caller that they could provide options for colleges in Lucknow as well.
objections.student_quote: Lucknow side mein nahi dekhte hain? Lucknow, Kanpur, Banaras.
objections.counsellor_quote: Bilkul main sir aapko Lucknow side ke bhi colleges share kar dungi.

objections.handling_strategy: The counsellor confirmed the budget and provided options within that range.
objections.student_quote: Haan aise hi samajh lijiye chheh se saat lakh total course mein hamara yadi available ho jaata hai.
objections.counsellor_quote: To iska fee jo around six to seven lakh hai.

query_buckets.query: Amity University ke baare mein jaanna
query_buckets.quote: Sir ek baar mereko thoda sa like ek baar university ke baare mein jaanna aur.
query_buckets.translation: Sir, I want to know a bit about the university.

query_buckets.query: Amity Noida ya Gurgaon
query_buckets.quote: Toh hum Gurgaon ya fir Noida campus?
query_buckets.translation: So should we apply to Gurgaon or Noida campus?

query_buckets.query: Fees structure for B.Sc Biotechnology
query_buckets.quote: Aap jo yeh five six lakh keh rahe ho woh, sir mereko four years wala course karna hai research wala.
query_buckets.translation: The five to six lakh you are mentioning, sir, I want to do a four-year research course.

query_buckets.query: Average placements for B.Sc Biotechnology
query_buckets.quote: Even main inke average placements bhi dekh paa raha hoon, B S C Biotechnology ke regarding inke average placement kaafi zyada better hai.
query_buckets.translation: I can also see the average placements for B.Sc Biotechnology are quite good.

counsellor_tactics.description: Counsellor greeted the student warmly and asked about her well-being.
counsellor_tactics.quote: Kaisi hain aap Palak?
counsellor_tactics.translation: How are you, Palak?

counsellor_tactics.description: Counsellor asked specific questions to understand the student's academic background and interests.
counsellor_tactics.quote: Aapka na inquiry mujhe receive hua tha ki aap colleges ko leke search kar rahe ho admission lene ke liye for M C A.
counsellor_tactics.translation: I received your inquiry that you are searching for colleges for admission in MCA.

counsellor_tactics.description: Counsellor suggested multiple campuses of Amity for the student to consider.
counsellor_tactics.quote: Toh aapko sirf Noida location ke liye jaana hai ya you also want to go from different universities, different location well?
counsellor_tactics.translation: So do you only want to go for Noida location or do you also want to consider different universities in different locations?

counsellor_tactics.description: Counsellor provided placement statistics to reassure the student about the course's value.
counsellor_tactics.quote: Around ten to twelve lakh rupees ka they are giving you average placement aur highest is more than one crore.
counsellor_tactics.translation: They are offering an average placement of around ten to twelve lakh rupees and the highest is more than one crore.

counsellor_tactics.description: Counsellor acknowledged the student's concerns about the scope of Biotechnology in India.
counsellor_tactics.quote: Aapka criteria bilkul theek hai lekin agar aapka criteria yeh hai ki aapko colleges chahiye in the basis of your interest toh fir aap B S C Biotechnology ke liye hi jaaiye.
counsellor_tactics.translation: Your criteria is absolutely fine, but if your criteria is that you want colleges based on your interest, then you should go for B.Sc Biotechnology.

objections.handling_strategy: Counsellor acknowledged the concern but emphasized the importance of interest in the field.
objections.student_quote: Matlab kya nahi hai itna? Itna scope nahi hai India ke andar Biotech ka.
objections.counsellor_quote: Aapka criteria bilkul theek hai lekin agar aapka criteria yeh hai ki aapko colleges chahiye in the basis of your interest toh fir aap B S C Biotechnology ke liye hi jaaiye.

objections.handling_strategy: Counsellor reassured the student that applying would not distract her from her NEET preparation.
objections.student_quote: Sir abhi ek hafte mein mera NEET hai toh main NEET ka woh dekh ke ki mere kya marks ban rahe hain uske baad sir main apply karungi.
objections.counsellor_quote: Toh mujhe lagta nahi aapko kuch distraction hogi.

query_buckets.query: Kya colleges dekh rahe hain?
query_buckets.quote: Bataiye, aap kya bacche ke liye kya plan kar rahe hain? Kaise colleges dekh rahe hain?
query_buckets.translation: Please tell me, what are you planning for your child? What kind of colleges are you looking at?

query_buckets.query: JEE Advanced ka bhi exam diya hai?
query_buckets.quote: JEE Advanced ka bhi exam diya hai?
query_buckets.translation: Has your child also taken the JEE Advanced exam?

query_buckets.query: Kis location mein colleges dekh rahe hain?
query_buckets.quote: Toh mainly aap Bangalore side colleges dekh rahe hain ya fir like NCR mein open hain?
query_buckets.translation: So are you mainly looking at colleges in Bangalore or are you open to NCR as well?

query_buckets.query: Kis budget mein aap colleges dekh rahe hain?
query_buckets.quote: Aap mujhe ek budget range bata sakte hain ki kis budget mein aap colleges dekh rahe hain student ke liye?
query_buckets.translation: Can you tell me a budget range for the colleges you are looking at for your child?

counsellor_tactics.description: The counsellor asked specific questions to understand the student's profile and needs.
counsellor_tactics.quote: Aapki is number se query receive hui thi, aap colleges plan kar rahe hain? Engineering colleges?
counsellor_tactics.translation: I received a query from this number, are you planning for colleges? Engineering colleges?

counsellor_tactics.description: The counsellor explained the competitive nature of college admissions based on exam results.
counsellor_tactics.quote: Ab kisi ek particular college mein na, maan lijiye 100 mein se 20 seat hain, woh 20 seat aapke JEE Mains ke basis pe allot hongi.
counsellor_tactics.translation: In a particular college, let's say there are 20 seats out of 100, those 20 seats will be allotted based on your JEE Mains.

counsellor_tactics.description: The counsellor offered to send college details via WhatsApp for further review.
counsellor_tactics.quote: Uska details madam nahi bhej sakte hain WhatsApp pe? Uspe saara hum check kar lete hain.
counsellor_tactics.translation: Can you send the details on WhatsApp? We will check everything there.

objections.counsellor_quote: Woh toh hai, bilkul. Bas paise ka issue nahi hai.

query_buckets.query: Yeh Chitkara aur CGC mein inme se kaun sa zyada achha hai?
query_buckets.quote: Yeh Chitkara aur CGC mein inme se kaun sa zyada achha hai?
query_buckets.translation: Which is better between Chitkara and CGC?

query_buckets.query: Placement ke taur pe zyada achha kaun sa hai?
query_buckets.quote: Mera na mera login to continue pe aa raha hai aap bata do ki placement ke taur pe zyada achha kaun sa hai.
query_buckets.translation: Which one is better in terms of placement?

counsellor_tactics.description: The counsellor structured the conversation by confirming the student's application and guiding them through the admission process.
counsellor_tactics.quote: To unhone application kiya tha na CGC mein.
counsellor_tactics.translation: So they had applied to CGC, right?

counsellor_tactics.description: The counsellor recommended multiple colleges based on the student's location and preferences.
counsellor_tactics.quote: Chandigarh ho gaya ya CGC Mohali ho gaya ya fir Chitkara.
counsellor_tactics.translation: So it could be Chandigarh, CGC Mohali, or Chitkara.

counsellor_tactics.description: The counsellor provided a comparison of CGC and Chitkara based on various factors.
counsellor_tactics.quote: Agar hum comparison ke base pe dekhe na to CGC ki rating hai aapki 4.3 ki hai based on the verified viewer jo already pass out hote hain students and Chitkara ki 4.2 hai.
counsellor_tactics.translation: If we look at the comparison, CGC has a rating of 4.3 based on verified viewers who are already pass-outs, and Chitkara has a rating of 4.2.

objections.handling_strategy: The counsellor reassured the student by providing comparative ratings and placement statistics.
objections.student_quote: In dono mein zyada confusion ho raha tha jaise CGC ya Chitkara mein se inme se zyada achha kaun sa hai?
objections.counsellor_quote: Dekhiye colleges dono hi sahi hain aapke.

call_flow_phases.description: The counsellor introduced himself and confirmed the student's application.
The counsellor discovered the student's queries regarding admission and college comparisons.
The counsellor recommended colleges based on the student's preferences.
The counsellor addressed the student's doubts about college quality.
The counsellor discussed the next steps and offered to send additional information via WhatsApp.

analysis.summary: The call involved a student inquiring about admissions to Chitkara University and CGC Mohali. The counsellor provided detailed comparisons and reassured the student about their options, ultimately offering to send further information via WhatsApp.
bot_learnings: Ensure to confirm the student's application status at the beginning of the call.
Provide structured comparisons between colleges based on ratings, fees, and placement statistics.
Address any quality doubts by sharing relevant data and student reviews.
